<aside>
💡 Nivana is the closest parallel in Marloth to the character of Alice in [American McGee’s Alice](../../Inspirations/Inspirations/American%20McGee%E2%80%99s%20Alice%202392ae8e06574413acc3590f1f416e24.md).

</aside>

<aside>
💡 Over the course of the series her signature outfit will become a hybrid riding dress.

</aside>
